reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Otra de las tantas de la red de YPF, con muy buena atención de los playeros. Suele haber fila de autos para el ingreso, ya que es muy concurrida.

(Translated by Google)
Another one of the many YPF stations, with excellent service from the attendants. There's usually a line of cars waiting to get in, as it's very busy.
